resources.string: Daily reminders for your plant care
Your plants felt your return.\nA fresh watering round is waiting tomorrow 💧

string-array.name: notif_morning_titles
string-array.item: Good morning, plant whisperer! 🌱
Your plants are already awake! ☀️
Time to start watering! 💧
Plants have feelings too! 🌿
Green morning! 🍀
Your plants are eagerly waiting! 🌞
Coffee ready… plants thirsty! ☕🌵
New day, new watering can! 🚿
Your plants ask: where are you?! 🌺
The sun is shining and your plants are smiling! 😊🌻

string-array.name: notif_morning_bodies
string-array.item: Your plants are calling your name… water them before they get angry! 😤🌱
If your plants could text, they\'d say: \"I\'m thirsty!\" 💬💧
Your plants waited for you all night… don\'t let them down! 🌙🥺
Plants have no legs to walk to the kitchen… help them! 🦶❌🪴
Imagine your plants could talk… they\'d be protesting! 📢🌿
Your plants are more loyal than some humans… show them gratitude! 💚
3 seconds of your time = a happy plant all day! ⏱️😄
Don\'t forget: plants love water more than you love coffee! ☕🌊
Your plants want nothing but a bit of water and lots of love! 💕🌱
Water your plants… before they ask for child support! 💸🪴
Your plants say: if you love me, water me! 🥹💧
Every drop of water = a smile on a leaf! 💧😊🍃
Your little seedling says: I grow thanks to you! Thank you! 🌱➡️🌳
If your plants had WhatsApp, you\'d have 100 messages! 📱🌿
There\'s a plant waiting for the hero of the day… and that\'s you! 🦸‍♂️🌺
Your plants feel lonely… go say hi! 👋🌵
Don\'t you want to see your plants shine today? Go on! 🥳🌻
Plants can\'t clap… but they can grow for you! 👏🌱
Calm your conscience and water your plants! 😇💧
Your plant asks: what did I do to deserve this thirst?! 😭🏜️

string-array.name: notif_evening_titles
string-array.item: Good evening, plant friend! 🌹
Your plants say good evening! 🌷
Before you go to bed… 🌙🌿
A friendly evening reminder! 💚
Your plants wish good night! 😴🌱
Last task of the day! 🎯🪴
Have a green evening! 💚🌿
Your plants want to make sure you don\'t forget them! 🧐🌺
Time to relax… with your plants! 🧘🌱
Hey plant hero! One last mission! 🦸🌻

string-array.name: notif_evening_bodies
string-array.item: Have you watered your plants today? If not, there\'s still time! ⏰🌱
Your plants want to fall asleep peacefully… water them and reassure them! 😴💧
Last chance today! Your plants are waiting before you turn off the light! 💡🌿
Your plants stayed up all night… don\'t let them sleep thirsty! 🥱💧
Plants also love to fall asleep happy… help them! 🛏️🌺
If you forgot to water, this is your last chance today! ⚡🪴
Before you turn on Netflix… water your plants! 📺🌱
One minute of your time = a happy plant all night! 🌙😊
Your plants can\'t sleep without water… just like you without a pillow! 🛌💧
Imagine waking up tomorrow and your plants are upset… don\'t risk it! 😱🌵
Your plants say: I don\'t want gifts, just water! 🎁❌💧✅
A quick watering before bed = a beautiful morning for your plants! 🌅🌿
Your plants will dream of water tonight… make the dream come true! 💭💧
Nothing\'s nicer than a watered plant at bedtime! 😌🌱
Your plants say: if you forget me again… I\'ll wilt! 😤🥀
Water your plants and earn karma points! 🤲🌿
Remember before sleep: your plants are entrusted to you! 💚🌺
Your plants produced oxygen for you all day… repay them with water! 🫁💧
Your plants need you… just one minute! ⏱️🥺🌱
The last night without watering… tomorrow is a new beginning! 🌈🪴

string-array.name: notif_no_reminder_titles
string-array.item: Day off for your plants! 🎉🌿
No watering today! 😎🪴
Your plants are resting! 💤🌱
A quiet day in the garden! 🧘🌻

string-array.name: notif_no_reminder_bodies
string-array.item: No reminders today… but check on your plants anyway! 👀🌱
Your plants are doing well and content! Enjoy your day! 😊🌿
No watering needed today! Maybe a quick hello? 👋🌺
A task-free day… but don\'t forget your plants love you! 💚🌷
Nothing to do today… but a loving glance costs nothing! 😍🌵
